name: Gator Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the alligator into 2-inch thick steaks and pound with a meat mallet for about one minute.
2. Cut each steak into strips about the size of your baby finger.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine lime juice, garlic, salt, and pepper. Add the alligator and coat it well with the marinade. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes, turning once during this time.
4. In another bowl, mix together flour, salt, pepper, cayenne pepper, and chili powder.
5. Heat vegetable oil to about 350°F (175°C) in a small frying pan or electric skillet. Drain the alligator on paper towels and blot dry.
6. Dredge each piece of gator in the seasoned flour mixture until fully coated, shaking off excess.
7. Fry the gator pieces in batches for about 1-2 minutes total, turning with a slotted spoon or wire skimmer. Be sure not to overcrowd the pan.
8. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately.
